en_title: Switch 2 Customers Have No Right to U.S. Tariff Refunds, Nintendo Argues, as They 'Received Exactly What They Bargained and Paid For'
cn_title: 任天堂拒绝向Switch 2用户退还关税：他们得到了应得之物
subtitle: 集体诉讼要求返还差价

paragraphs.en: Nintendo might be receiving a refund for the money it spent on U.S. tariffs, but it claims it's under no obligation to pass that money back to consumers — even though they paid higher prices for Switch 2 products.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂可能会拿回此前缴纳的美国关税，但公司声称没有义务把这笔钱返还给消费者——尽管消费者曾为Switch 2产品支付更高价格。

paragraphs.en: Shortly before launch last year, Nintendo raised the price of Switch 2 accessories and subsequently announced a price rise for the original Switch . The company — like every electronics manufacturer — has seen its financial margins under pressure due to rising component prices and, last year, the U.S. tariffs rolled out by the Trump administration. Switch 2 pre-orders in the U.S. and Canada was even delayed as a result .
paragraphs.cn: 去年Switch 2发售前不久，任天堂提高了Switch 2配件价格，随后又宣布初代Switch涨价。和所有电子产品制造商一样，该公司因零部件价格上涨以及特朗普政府去年推出的美国关税而面临利润压力，Switch 2在美国和加拿大的预购甚至因此推迟。

paragraphs.en: A year later, and the U.S. Supreme Court has now deemed those tariffs were illegal, with refunds promised to businesses who paid them from a collective $160 billion tariff refund. But what about the consumers who paid more, in response to the tariffs? A proposed class action lawsuit is brewing, calling for Nintendo to share its refund with Switch purchasers — but the company itself has said it has no reason to do so.
paragraphs.cn: 一年后，美国最高法院现已裁定这些关税违法，并承诺从总额160 billion，即1600亿美元(约合人民币10832亿元)的关税退款中向缴税企业返款。但那些因关税而多付钱的消费者怎么办？一项拟议中的集体诉讼要求任天堂与Switch购买者分享退款，但任天堂表示没有理由这么做。

paragraphs.en: As reported by Game File , Nintendo has asked for the proposed legal action to be dismissed as customers "received exactly what they bargained and paid for." In other words, it was the customers' decision to buy a product at the stated price at the time, regardless of the reasons why that price may have been higher due to tariffs.
paragraphs.cn: 据Game File报道，任天堂要求驳回拟议诉讼，理由是消费者「得到了他们协商并付款购买的东西」。换言之，无论标价是否因关税而更高，消费者当时仍自行决定按该价格购买产品。

paragraphs.en: "The common thread among Plaintiffs' claims is that it is somehow unfair," Nintendo wrote, "that Nintendo has not retroactively adjusted its prices for completed sales in response to the outcome of the tariff litigation. But that is now how commercial transactions work.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂写道：「原告各项主张的共同点，是认为任天堂没有根据关税诉讼结果追溯调整已完成交易的价格，似乎有失公平。但商业交易并不是这样运作的。」

paragraphs.en: "Nintendo or one of its retailers set a price for each product, and consumers decided whether that price was worth paying. Those who bought Nintendo's products received exactly what they bargained and paid for: a console, game and/or accessory at a price to which both parties agreed. The money Plaintiffs paid represents the purchase price of the goods they wanted and received; Plaintiffs are not entitled to a rebate simply because of intervening legal developments related to tariffs."
paragraphs.cn: 「任天堂或其零售商为每件产品定价，消费者则决定该价格是否值得支付。购买任天堂产品的人得到的正是他们协商并付款购买的东西：按双方同意的价格购买一台主机、一款游戏和/或一件配件。原告支付的钱是他们想要并已收到商品的购买价；不能仅因后来出现与关税有关的法律进展，就有权获得退款。」

paragraphs.en: Nintendo goes on to argue that it raised the cost of Switch accessories and consoles due to a myriad of reasons — not just tariffs — including the costs of memory, labor and shipping. It also absorbed all of the impact of tariffs on the Switch 2, which remains at its launch price today (though will very shortly be going up in cost).
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂进一步辩称，提高Switch配件和主机价格源于多种因素，并非只有关税，还包括内存、人工和运输成本。公司还自行承担了关税对Switch 2的全部影响，因此该主机至今仍维持首发价格（不过很快就会涨价）。

paragraphs.en: "Unlike many of its market peers, Nintendo did not simply increase each product’s price by the amount of tariffs it paid on that product or impose an across-the-board tariff surcharge," the company stated. "Instead, Nintendo imposed modest and selective price adjustments, and it chose to bear the costs of tariffs on some of its most popular products of 2025, including its flagship console, the Nintendo Switch 2.
paragraphs.cn: 公司表示：「与许多同行不同，任天堂并未简单地按照每件产品所缴关税金额加价，也没有全面收取关税附加费。相反，任天堂只进行了温和且有选择的价格调整，并选择自行承担2025年部分最热门产品的关税成本，其中包括旗舰主机Nintendo Switch 2。」

paragraphs.en: "If a consumer did not want to pay the advertised price, they were free to abstain from purchasing the product or seek out competing products," Nintendo concluded (not that Xbox or PlayStation have been immune to price rises, either). A judge will now rule on whether to allow the proposed class action suit to continue, or side with Nintendo and have it dismissed.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂最后表示：「如果消费者不愿支付标示价格，可以自由选择不购买，或寻找竞品。」当然，XBOX和PlayStation也同样未能避开涨价。法官接下来将裁定是否允许这项拟议集体诉讼继续，还是支持任天堂并驳回案件。

opus_summary: 美国最高法院裁定相关关税违法后，任天堂可能获得退款；一项拟议集体诉讼要求把部分退款返还给曾高价购买Switch产品的消费者。任天堂主张消费者已按双方认可的价格取得商品，且涨价还受内存、人工和运输等多重成本影响。
